rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM PEARSON VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Joinder To Deft Union Carbide Corporation'S Mo For Protective Order Re: Pltf'S Deposition
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, February 16, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. The Joinder of defendants Worthington Ford, Inc., Pep Boys, Manny, Moe & Jace of California, Kaiser Gypsum Company, Inc., Canoga Builders Supplies, Borg-Warner Corporation, C & M Building Materials, Inc., and Kelly-Moore Paint Company, Inc. are granted in part. The total allowed time for Deft Union Carbide Corporation's Mo For Protective Order Re: Pltf'S Deposition is 40 hours including the 16 hours and 46 minutes taken so far. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: FRANCIS FANELLI et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Exclude Plaintiffs' Supplemental Amended Responses To Standard Asbestos Case Interrogatories Or Reference To The Shangri-La Or In The Alternative To Reopen Plaintiffs' Deposition, Continue The Trial Date, And Stay Expert Depositions
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, February 16, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 4. The hearing on Sloan Valve's motion to Exclude Plaintiffs' Supplemental Amended Responses To Standard Asbestos Case Interrogatories Or Reference To The Shangri-La Or In The Alternative To Reopen Plaintiffs' Deposition, Continue The Trial Date, And Stay Expert Depositions is continued to February 18, 2010 at 9am to give the parties more time to meet and confer and reach a resolution of the issues if they are able to do so. The parties are required to send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org no later than February 16, 2010 at 4:30pm stating whether they have reached a resolution and, if not, what issues remain in dispute without providing any argument on those issues and, if any issues remain in dispute, the parties need to appear on February 18, 2010 at 9:00 a.m. for the hearing. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: FRANCIS FANELLI et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder In Defendant Sloan Valve Companys Motion To Exclude Plaintiffs Supplemental-Amended Responses To Standard Asbestos Case Interrogatories Or Reference To The Shangri-La Or In The Alternative To Reopen Plaintiffs Deposition, Continue The Trial Date, And Stay Expert Depositions
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, February 16, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 4. The hearing on DEFENDANT BONDEX INTERNATIONAL, INC.'s Joinder In Defendant Sloan Valve Companys Motion To Exclude Plaintiffs Supplemental-Amended Responses To Standard Asbestos Case Interrogatories Or Reference To The Shangri-La Or In The Alternative To Reopen Plaintiffs Deposition, Continue The Trial Date, And Stay Expert Depositions is continued to February 18, 2010 at 9am to give the parties more time to meet and confer and reach a resolution of the issues if they are able to do so. The parties are required to send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org no later than February 16, 2010 at 4:30pm stating whether they have reached a resolution and, if not, what issues remain in dispute without providing any argument on those issues and, if any issues remain in dispute, the parties need to appear on February 18, 2010 at 9:00 a.m. for the hearing. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: LEONARD SHIELDS et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder In Motion For Protective Order
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, February 16, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Mack Trucks, Inc.'s joinder in the motion for protective order is granted in part and denied in part in accordance with the court's February 5, 2010 ruling. Mack Truck's joinder was not decided on February 5, 2010 because it was filed on January 29, 2010, after the court granted Volkswagen's ex parte application for an order shortening time on the hearing date. = (220/HEK)
